overall.description: Gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt of Rivia walking along a dirt path through rural countryside at night. The character travels from a wooded area with wooden barricades through open fields and finally between stone walls toward a distant settlement, with atmospheric blue moonlight illuminating the scene.

scene_state.functional_zone: forest edge path with wooden fortifications

events.description: passing by broken wooden barricade structure on the left side

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking steadily along the dirt path with two swords strapped to his back, moving past wooden defenses

entered.detail: broken wooden fence structure with diagonal support beams
muddy trail winding through the countryside
dense dark pine trees forming the forest backdrop
tall green grass and wildflowers lining the path edge

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with Geralt walking along a dirt path at night, passing wooden barricades on the left. The path is bordered by tall grass on the right and leads toward a dark pine forest in the distance, illuminated by blue moonlight.

agents.ego_description: continuing along the winding dirt path through open fields with tall grass swaying in the breeze

entered.detail: rolling hills visible on the horizon under the night sky

segments.scene_description: The wooden structures fall behind as the path opens into wide countryside fields. Geralt continues walking along the trail, now surrounded by expansive tall grass fields with distant hills visible on the horizon under the dark sky.

events.description: stone walls appear on both sides of the path, creating a corridor
warm lights from distant village buildings become visible ahead

agents.ego_description: walking between ancient stone walls toward the warm glow of distant settlement lights

entered.detail: ancient stacked stone wall running alongside the left of the path
stacked stone wall appearing on the right side of the trail
warm orange glowing lights from buildings in the distance

segments.scene_description: The path narrows between ancient stone walls as Geralt approaches a settlement. Warm lights from distant buildings become visible ahead, contrasting with the cool blue night. The stone walls create a corridor effect as the character continues toward civilization.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a moonlit rural landscape that transitions from a wooded trail into an open countryside and finally toward a glowing settlement. It begins with Geralt walking along a dirt path past wooden barricades, with the route bordered by tall grass and leading toward a dark pine forest under a cool blue light. As the wooden structures fall behind, the environment expands into wide countryside fields where the path is surrounded by expansive tall grass and distant hills on the horizon. The scene then shifts as the trail narrows between ancient stone walls, creating a corridor effect that guides the character forward. Finally, the cool moonlight contrasts with the warm lights of distant buildings as the camera moves toward the approaching settlement.
